subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The station of the Praised One is an extended shade, both the witness and the witnessed, the Sovereign of existence, yet a hundred thousand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مقام محمود ظل ممدود است و شاهد و مشهود سلطان وجود ولی صد هزار
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun
